chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Transfer Application No.S-19 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of main case 23-02-2024 Mr. Muhammad Hanif Kalhoro, Advocate along with applicant. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G for the State. ***** Mr. Shahid Amin Mashori Advocate has filed power on behalf of private respondents, who are also present in person. After hearing this matter at some length, this Crl. Transfer Application is disposed of with consent by directing the trial Court to expedite the trial. Since the applicant is apprehending backlash and harsh behavior from the private respondents, who are her close relatives and there appears to be a dispute between the parties over agricultural land, the applicant would be at liberty to file application before the trial Court and the trial Court after hearing the parties and determining the complaint in application would provide due protection to the applicant in accordance with law. JUDGE Ahmad
